mapper.select: SELECT * FROM pa_txn_leasing_site_visit WHERE prospect_id = #{prospectId} ORDER BY visit_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE pa_txn_leasing_site_visit SET company_id = #{companyId}, property_id = #{propertyId}, property_name = #{propertyName}, requirement_level = #{requirementLevel}, block_id = #{blockId}, block_name = #{blockName}, floor_id = #{floorId}, floor_name = #{floorName}, unit_id = #{unitId}, visit_at = #{visitAt}, status = #{status}, notes = #{notes}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id}
